text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! Looks like I'll be first to the finish line. ☆

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Don't be so sure! I'm right on your tail!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Grrr! I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Pant... pant... pant... Air Groove...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Ngh! I've completely lost sight of her!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Oh, Dober! You're just the person I wanted to see!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I found a potential shortcut, but there's a huge boulder blocking the
path!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you'd like, why don't we work together? The two of us could
probably hurl the boulder into oblivion and take the lead, just like
that!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: H-hurl? A boulder?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Indeed. ♪ I'm sure we can do it with our combined strength... My
princess instincts are telling me so!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(What should I do? If what Kawakami says is true, I might be able to
catch up with Air Groove.)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(Even if I stay on this path, I won't be able to close the gap between
us... I need to do something!)

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: All right. Let's do it.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Thank you! ♪ Now... let's get to it!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Okay, push on three! One, two, three!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Out of our WAAAY!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
We did it! Alone, we may be lacking, but with the power of teamwork,
no obstacle can stand in our way!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Erm... Did you really need me here?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Of course! Come, let's proceed! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Oh dear, a dead end? There's no way we can hurl an entire cliff out of
our way.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
What's with that signboard? "The road shall not open for those who
lack beauty"?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: W-weird... Is it a riddle?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
There's no doubt Ms. Beauty put it here, but I have no idea what it
means...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Nnngh, neither do I! Let's take a break before my brain short-circuits!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: By the way... Why did you decide to audition, Dober?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Naturally, I signed up in order to get closer to becoming the ideal
princess.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Getting closer to an ideal... Maybe I did it for a similar reason.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I get nervous and can't run my best when people are watching me...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
So I thought becoming a muse might boost my confidence and help
me grow a little.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: But I haven't changed at all. I can't even catch up with Air Groove.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hmmm! I don't know about that!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Just stepping out of your comfort zone and taking on this audition
means you've already started to grow.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: The most important thing is the desire to improve yourself. It's all about working toward becoming your ideal self!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Kawakami...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I want to become a princess even a world-class designer will acknowledge...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
And you've got the same look in your eyes. I can see that you have an
ideal version of yourself that you want to be. That's why I asked you
to help me.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: I... see.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
If you're ever stuck in a rut, I'm certain we can push through it
together with guts and determination, just like we did with that 
boulder!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I'll always be happy to lend you a hand. ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Hehe, that's reassuring. Thank you, Kawakami.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text:
(The only thing I need to focus on is moving forward. That way I can
become the person I want to be, just like Kawakami is doing.)

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, someone's fired up! ♪ Okay, now we just have to solve the
riddle on this signboard...
UWAAAUGH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: It came from the direction of the stream... Let's go!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Gasp!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Urgh... Where am I?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Dober
text_block_list.text: Air Groove?! Did she fall from that waterfall?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: What in the world is going on?!
